message:
Enhance bead specs with comprehensive implementations

Enhanced beads with detailed specs, unit tests, and logging requirements:

- bd-28r: WebSocket for key events with full implementation
- bd-1go: RateLimiter with async/sync wait, robot mode status
- bd-2ag: TokenBucket with burst capacity and refill logic
- bd-53g: Embed-images with base64 encoding and cleanup
- bd-zcq: Rate limit CLI flag with burst support
- bd-18h: Rate limiter integration into batch operations
- bd-3c2: Gesture CLI flags with validation
- bd-mwd: Robot mode rate limit reporting with batch summary
- bd-26y: Watch-config robot mode with event types
- bd-1eu: Cache hit/miss robot mode reporting
- bd-3lf: Dry-run robot mode JSON structure for all commands
- bd-1n3: Comprehensive rate limiting test coverage

All beads now include:
- Full implementation code with proper error handling
- Unit tests and integration test specifications
- Robot mode JSON output schemas
- Structured logging (TRACE/DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
